title: Software Engineer Contract / Intern
description:
**Company Description** 




 Counsly AI is an innovative AI Operating System specifically designed for law firms looking to scale their operations. The platform automates client intake processes, qualifies leads, and schedules consultations around the clock. By streamlining workflows, Counsly AI empowers legal practices to enhance efficiency and focus on delivering exceptional client service. Our mission is to help law firms grow while reducing administrative tasks through smart and cutting\\-edge technology.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 This is a remote contract/internship role for a Software Engineer at Counsly AI. As a Software Engineer Intern, you will be responsible for contributing to the design, development, and implementation of back\\-end systems, writing clean and efficient code, and utilizing Object\\-Oriented Programming principles. Day\\-to\\-day tasks involve collaborating with the development team, troubleshooting software issues, and participating in the development of innovative AI\\-powered solutions for our platform.
 



  





**Qualifications** 



* Proficiency in Programming, Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP), and Back\\-End Web Development
* Strong foundation in Computer Science principles and Software Development practices
* Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment as well as independently
* Proficiency in Node.js, React.Js (MERN stack), Python, and Back\\-End Web Development
* Experience with AI\\-driven solutions or interest in artificial intelligence is a plus
* Currently enrolled in or recently completed a degree program in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field



  





**Compensation and Benefits** 



* Competitive stipend: ₹25,000 INR/month
* Flexible hours: 30\\-40 hours/week, fully remote
* Real production impact: Work on live law firm deployments
* Mentorship: Direct guidance from senior engineers with AI/legal tech expertise
* Extension potential: Top performers convert to full\\-time with equity opportunities
* 3 months of Contract/Internship with possibility of Extension



  





 Apply if: You're a Final Year CS student/recent grad in India excited about AI voice agents and want production experience that beats any college project. Email resume \\+ GitHub to careers@counsly.ai with "India SWE Intern" subject.
